notes.ga4Pageviews: Raw traffic demand — higher weight = prioritize popular content
notes.ga4AvgDuration: Content quality signal — 5min cap, lower weight because noisy
notes.gscImpressions: SEO visibility / keyword demand — tied with pageviews as top signal
notes.affiliateClicks: Monetization potential — directly tied to revenue
notes.trendsRelevance: Timeliness — rising trends get a boost
